_comment: Per-card forge overrides. Applied on top of all other settings for matching cards. Keys: exact reference (ALT_CORE_B_AX_04_U_10) or prefix wildcard ending with * (ALT_ALIZE_B_AX_*). Wildcard matches any card whose reference starts with the prefix. When multiple patterns match, they are applied from least specific (shortest prefix) to most specific (longest prefix / exact match), so the most specific always wins. Values are deep-merged into the card's forge section — only the fields you specify are overridden.
